name: simple
title: Activation:Simple
description: The declaration to activate a set of configurations.

payloadkeys.content: An array of strings that specify the identifiers of configurations to install. A failure to install one of the configurations doesn't prevent other configurations from installing.

A predicate format string as [Apple's Predicate Programming](https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/Cocoa/Conceptual/Predicates/AdditionalChapters/Introduction.html) describes. The activation only installs when the predicate evaluates to `true` or isn't present.
